WeMOi monthly data (1821-2019)												
												
-999 missing value												
												
Moderate reliable values: 1821-1869. Jul1873-Aug1873. May1874. 1921. Jul1924. Apr1927. 1933-1943. Jun1989-Dec1994. Mar2002. Jun2006-Jul2006. Jun2011-Dec2011.												
                                                                                												
MARTIN-VIDE J. LOPEZ-BUSTINS JA. 2006. The Western Mediterranean Oscillation and Iberian Peninsula Rainfall. International Journal of Climatology 26: 1455-1475.
